revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23168229401|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CiteQuran_Ayah%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{tsh|qref}} {{Lua|Module:String}} A Template to makes citations of the Quran, linking to pages of https://quran.com . __FORCETOC__ == Usage == This template is used to provide reference of [[Āyah|Quran Verses]]. Basic Code format: {{CiteQuran Ayah|SurahNumber|AyahNumber}} ::'''OR Shortcut''' ::::::{{qref|SurahNumber|AyahNumber}} Advance Code format: {{CiteQuran Ayah|SurahNumber|AyahNumber|b=y/yt|s=y|t=c/si|c=y}} == Redirects == These are the redirects means we can also use these words to use this templete, e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|Qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl}} {{tlc|_show_result=yes|Qverse|2|256|b{{=}}yl}} *{{t|Qref}} *{{t|Qverse}} *{{t|Citequran}} *{{t|Quranverse}} *{{t|Quranrange}} == Optional parameters == '''1. b''' :b, short-form of begin. It make the cite to begin cite with the word '''Quran'''. :It has two value: ::*'''y''', short for ''yes'', To add and begin cite with the word Quran. e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}y}} ::*'''yl''', short for ''yes with link'', To add and begin with the word Quran with link of word 'Quran' to its Wikipedia page. Avoid use of '''yl''' , more than once in a single article as per [[MOS:REPEATLINK]]. :::e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl}} '''2. s''' :s, short-form of Superscript. It add cites in superscript style. :It has only one value, ::'''y''' short for ''yes'' e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|s{{=}}y}} {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl|s{{=}}y}} '''3. c''' :c, short-form of Chapter (Surah). It add and begin cite with the Surah (Chapter) Name. There is no effect of '''s''' parameter on it. It is recommended to not use this together with '''b''' parameter. :It has only one value, ::'''y''' short for ''yes'' e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|c{{=}}y}} '''4. t''' :t, short-form of translation. It is use to add a specific translation, like ''[[The Clear Quran]], [[:en:Sahih International|Sahih International]], [[Tafhim-ul-Quran]]'' and translation of [[Muhammad Abdel-Haleem|Abdul Haleem]], [[The Meaning of the Glorious Koran|Pickthall]], [[The Holy Qur'an: Text, Translation and Commentary|Yusuf Ali]] and other popular Quran translations. Translation name will be always in superscript. ::e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}c|b{{=}}yl}} :It has following value. ::*'''c''' for [[The Clear Quran]] ::*'''si''' for [[:en:Sahih International|Sahih International]] ::*'''tq''' for [[Tafhim-ul-Quran]] ::*'''h''' for [[Muhammad Abdel-Haleem|Abdul Haleem]] ::*'''p''' for [[The Meaning of the Glorious Koran|Pickthall]] ::*'''y''' for [[The Holy Qur'an: Text, Translation and Commentary|Yusuf Ali]] ::*'''nq''' for [[Noble Quran (Hilali–Khan)]] '''5. pl''' :pl, short-form of Plainlinks. It create link which is ''not'' followed by an [[Help:External link icons|external link icon]]. ::e.g. {{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl|pl{{=}}y}} ==== Example ==== {|class="wikitable" |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2}} {{Spaces|4}}to cite entire Surah (chapter) |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256-257}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}y|s{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl|s{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|c{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}p|b{{=}}yl|s{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}c|b{{=}}yl}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}si|b{{=}}yl}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}c|c{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|s{{=}}y|t{{=}}si|c{{=}}y}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|t{{=}}y|b{{=}}yl}} |- |{{tlc|_show_result=yes|qref|2|256|b{{=}}yl|pl{{=}}y}} |} ==See also== *{{t|Cite Quran}} *{{t|CiteHadith}} *{{t|Cite Tafsir}} == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Surah (Chapter)", "description": "Enter Surah (Chapter) Number e.g. 4. To cite entire Surah (chapter), don't give Ayah (verse) number.", "type": "number", "required": true, "example": "4" }, "2": { "label": "Ayah (Verse or Range of Verse)", "description": "Enter Ayah (Verses) Number e.g. 2, or Range of Verse e.g. 2-7. To cite entire Surah (chapter), leave this blank.", "type": "number", "example": "2 or 2-7", "suggested": true }, "s": { "label": "Superscript (Optional)", "description": "It add cites in superscript style. To add, type ' y '.", "example": "y ", "type": "string", "suggestedvalues": [ "y" ], "suggested": true }, "b": { "label": "Add Word Quran (Optional)", "description": "It make the cite to begin with the word Quran. Type ' y ' to add and begin with the word Quran which show as 'Quran 3:24'. Type ' yl ' to add the word Quran with link of word 'Quran' to it's Wikipedia page. Avoid use of yl , more than once in a single article as per MOS:REPEATLINK.", "example": "y or yl", "type": "string", "suggestedvalues": [ "y", "yl" ], "suggested": true }, "c": { "label": "Add Chapter (Surah) Name. (Optional)", "description": "It add and begin cite with the Surah (Chapter) Name. There is no effect of s parameter on it. It is recommended to not use this together with b parameter.", "example": "y", "type": "string", "suggestedvalues": [ "y" ], "suggested": true }, "t": { "label": "Add Specific Translation (Optional)", "description": "It is use to add a specific translation, like The Clear Quran, Sahih International, Tafhim-ul-Quran and translation of Abdul Haleem, Pickthall, Yusuf Ali and other popular Quran translations. Translation name will be always in superscript. Give these values: c for The Clear Quran, si for Sahih International, tq for Tafhim-ul-Quran, h for Abdul Haleem, p for Pickthall, y for Yusuf Ali, nq for Noble Quran (Hilali–Khan)", "example": "c or si", "type": "string", "suggestedvalues": [ "c", "si", "tq", "h", "y", "p", "nq" ], "suggested": true }, "pl": { "label": "Plainlink (Optional)", "description": "It create link which is ''not'' followed by an external link icon.", "example": "y", "type": "string", "suggestedvalues": [ "y" ], "suggested": true } }, "description": "Cite Quran Verse/Chapter with Translation from quran.com. This Template will create a link of Ayah (verse), range of Ayah (verse) or just an entire Surah (Chapter). This is '''CiteQuran Ayah''' Template.", "paramOrder": [ "1", "2", "s", "b", "c", "t", "pl" ] } {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Quran templates]] [[Category:Islam templates]] [[Category:External link templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
